verification_notes: Sandboxed in node with rules-engine: confirmed (1) immediate-win take, (2) immediate-loss block, (3) center preference on empty, (4) corner fallback when center taken, (5) win-priority beats block-priority, (6) input not mutated, (7) returned index always in legalMoves(state).

sub_goals.description: Implement ai-opponent.js exposing chooseMove(state, aiSymbol). Heuristic ladder: win, block, center, corner, edge. Uses RulesEngine.legalMoves/applyMove/checkOutcome only; never reimplements win logic.
